race.description: The Burwood Inn Super Mdn Plate
race.comment: MISTY VEIL (9) returns from a 20-week break. Beaten in a photo when fresh from a spell last prep over 1000m at Wyong. Has the pace to overcome the wide draw and looks ready to open her account. ELSKA (6) settled at the tail of the field then worked home well in testing conditions to finish fifth on debut last start over this course and distance. Key runner on a better surface today with that race experience now on board. LOVE YOU ANYWAY (8) has been in the money eight times from 17 starts. Started favourite but missed the frame at her latest appearance over 1006m at Port Macquarie. Races well here at the trip and can improve on firmer footing than last time. VINGT NEUF NOIR (11) filled a placing for the first time when fresh from a spell over 1000m at Kembla four weeks ago. Promising signs and can play a part here if that wasn't a one-off. PISTOLEER (12) is a Proisir two-year-old on debut for Bjorn Baker. Trialling like a horse with its share of ability.
